text.title: Decision Analysis Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure from decision brief to signed record.

step.name: define-decision
step.action: Write one-sentence decision statement + reversal cost estimate.

step.name: enumerate-options
step.action: List ≥2 options INCLUDING "do nothing" baseline. Add is_baseline=true on the status-quo entry.

step.name: lock-criteria
step.action: Define 3-9 criteria with weights summing to 1.0. Record weights_locked_at timestamp.

step.name: score-with-evidence
step.action: Score each cell 1-5 with evidence URL or doc citation. No cell ships without evidence.

step.name: sensitivity-monte-carlo
step.action: Run ≥1000 Monte Carlo iterations with ±20% weight jitter. Compute rank_flip_rate per option pair.
step.decision-gate: If rank_flip_rate > 0.15, surface unstable_pairs and route back to stakeholder.

step.name: signoff
step.action: Named approver signs with 1-paragraph rationale citing matrix outcome AND sensitivity.
